---
name: Pull request
about: Submit changes to the Jobilo codebase
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue)
Related to #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ feat — new feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 🐛 fix — bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] 📝 docs — documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] ✅ test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔧 chore — build/config/dependency changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles and builds (`npm run build` / `tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, API docs, JSDoc)
- [ ] Changelog entry added in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] PR size < 400 lines (excluding generated files, lockfiles, and tests)

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
|        |       |

## Testing Notes

Describe how you tested this change.

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Tested manually in staging

## Deployment Notes

Any special instructions for deploying this change?

- [ ] Database migration required
- [ ] Environment variables added
- [ ] Background jobs/dependencies updated
- [ ] Feature flag required
- [ ] Breaking change — API consumers must update

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.
